public_reputation: Marshal of ore lifts, convoy timing, and emergency track clearance at Ashforge Quarry.
appearance: Rail Marshal Kord Vex carries the marks of rail marshal in industrial grit: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a rail marshal whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Ashforge Quarry.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of rail marshal in and around Ashforge Quarry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Ashforge Quarry while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to work shortfalls is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Rail Marshal Kord Vex can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Ashforge Quarry.
Rail Marshal Kord Vex becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a rail marshal.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Rail Marshal Kord Vex is readable as a rail marshal tied to Ashforge Quarry.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashforge Quarry: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Rail Marshal Kord Vex presents as someone shaped by the duties of a rail marshal and the daily pressures of Ashforge Quarry.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a rail marshal, and proof that strangers will not make Ashforge Quarry harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Rail Marshal Kord Vex refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a rail marshal too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Rail Marshal Kord Vex can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Rail Marshal Kord Vex adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Rail Marshal Kord Vex always knows more about Ashforge Quarry than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to rail marshal duties in Ashforge Quarry.
social_texture: Rail Marshal Kord Vex speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Ashforge Quarry, people read them as quota-aware, contribution-minded, and never fully off the clock.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to production; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but work shortfalls becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Rail touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Rail Marshal Kord Vex when the party needs a socially grounded face for Ashforge Quarry: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
